meaning: vt.给...开口,钻孔,开始讨论,提出
examples: She was dreading having to broach the subject of money to her father.
They still have to broach many tricky subjects.
But these are important issues and it is better to broach them.
Timing is everything but my recommendation is to broach the subject only after cocktails.
They have you pick whether you want Elizabeth to wear a bird or a cage broach.
